conflictDescription: GDPR requires data protection by design; CRA requires security by design for digital products. Both address overlapping technical measures.
resolutionPrinciple: Unified security-by-design framework satisfying both GDPR Art. 25 and CRA Annex I requirements simultaneously

conflictDescription: GDPR 72-hour breach notification may conflict with NIS2 tiered notification (24h early warning + 72h initial + 1 month final). Different granularity levels.
resolutionPrinciple: Apply the stricter timeline: 24-hour early warning per NIS2, with 72-hour detailed notification satisfying both GDPR Art. 33 and NIS2 Art. 23
